title: 📜 Bharatiya Samvidhan (Constitution)
facts: Samvidhan 26 November 1949 ko adopt hua aur 26 January 1950 ko lagu (effective) hua.
Drafting Committee ke chairman the Dr. B.R. Ambedkar — inhe 'Samvidhan ke janak' kehte hain.
Bharat ka Samvidhan duniya ka sabse lamba likhit (written) constitution hai.
Shuruaat me ismein 395 Articles, 22 Parts aur 8 Schedules the.
Preamble (Prastavana) me 'We the People of India' likha hai — yani shakti janta ke paas hai.

quiz.question: Bharat ka Samvidhan kab lagu (effective) hua?
quiz.explanation: 26 Jan 1950 ko Samvidhan lagu hua, isi din ko Republic Day manate hain.

title: 🏞️ Bharat ki Nadiyan (Rivers)
facts: Ganga Bharat ki sabse lambi nadi hai (~2525 km), jo Gangotri se nikalti hai.
Brahmaputra Tibet se shuru hokar Bharat aur Bangladesh me behti hai.
Godavari South India (peninsular) ki sabse lambi nadi hai.
Narmada aur Tapti paschim (west) ki taraf Arabian Sea me girti hain.
Ganga aur Brahmaputra milkar duniya ka sabse bada delta — Sundarban — banati hain.

quiz.question: Bharat ki sabse lambi nadi kaun si hai?
quiz.explanation: Ganga (~2525 km) Bharat ki sabse lambi nadi hai.

title: 🪐 Saur Mandal (Solar System)
facts: Brihaspati (Jupiter) saur mandal ka sabse bada grah hai.
Budh (Mercury) Sooraj ke sabse paas hai, par sabse garam grah Shukra (Venus) hai.
Prithvi ka ek hi prakritik upgrah (satellite) hai — Chandrama.
Sooraj ek taara (star) hai, grah nahi.
Prakash (light) ki gati lagbhag 3 lakh km/second hoti hai.

quiz.question: Saur mandal ka sabse bada grah kaun sa hai?
quiz.explanation: Brihaspati (Jupiter) saur mandal ka sabse bada grah hai.

title: 🏛️ Bharatiya Sansad (Parliament)
facts: Bharatiya Sansad ke do sadan hain: Lok Sabha aur Rajya Sabha.
Lok Sabha (lower house) ki adhiktam sankhya 552 hai.
Rajya Sabha (upper house) ki adhiktam sankhya 250 hai.
Money Bill (dhan vidheyak) sirf Lok Sabha me hi pesh ho sakta hai.
Rashtrapati (President) bhi Sansad ka ang (part) maana jaata hai.

quiz.question: Money Bill (dhan vidheyak) sabse pehle kis sadan me pesh hota hai?
quiz.explanation: Money Bill sirf Lok Sabha me hi pesh kiya ja sakta hai.

title: 🇮🇳 Rashtriya Pratik (National Symbols)
facts: Rashtriya pashu: Bengal Tiger (Bagh).
Rashtriya pakshi: Mor (Peacock).
Rashtriya phool: Kamal (Lotus).
Rashtriya ped: Bargad (Banyan tree).
Rashtriya geet 'Vande Mataram' Bankim Chandra Chattopadhyay ne likha.

quiz.question: Bharat ka rashtriya pakshi kaun sa hai?
quiz.explanation: Mor (Peacock) Bharat ka rashtriya pakshi hai.

title: 👤 Bharat ke 'Pehle' (Firsts)
facts: Pehle Pradhan Mantri: Pandit Jawaharlal Nehru.
Pehle Rashtrapati: Dr. Rajendra Prasad.
Pehli mahila Pradhan Mantri: Indira Gandhi.
Pehle Up-Rashtrapati: Dr. S. Radhakrishnan.
Pehli mahila Rashtrapati: Pratibha Patil.

quiz.question: Bharat ke pehle Rashtrapati kaun the?
quiz.explanation: Dr. Rajendra Prasad Bharat ke pehle Rashtrapati the.

title: 🏔️ Parvat aur Chotiyan (Mountains)
facts: Mount Everest (8849 m) duniya ki sabse unchi choti hai (Nepal-China seema).
K2 duniya ki doosri sabse unchi choti hai.
Kangchenjunga Bharat ki sabse unchi choti hai (Sikkim).
Himalaya duniya ki sabse uvi (young) parvat shrinkhla hai.
Aravalli duniya ki sabse purani parvat shrinkhalaon me se ek hai (Rajasthan).

quiz.question: Duniya ki sabse unchi choti kaun si hai?
quiz.explanation: Mount Everest (8849 m) duniya ki sabse unchi choti hai.

title: 🦴 Manav Shareer (Human Body)
facts: Vyask (adult) manushya ke shareer me 206 haddiyan (bones) hoti hain.
Sabse badi haddi: Femur (jaangh ki haddi).
Sabse chhoti haddi: Stapes (kaan me).
Manushya me 4 group of blood hote hain: A, B, AB, O.
Hriday (heart) ek minute me lagbhag 72 baar dhadakta hai.

quiz.question: Vyask manushya ke shareer me kitni haddiyan hoti hain?
quiz.explanation: Vyask manushya me 206 haddiyan hoti hain (bachche me zyada hoti hain).

title: 🎖️ Swatantrata Sangram (Freedom Struggle)
facts: 1857 ka vidroh Bharat ka 'Pehla Swatantrata Sangram' kehlata hai.
Indian National Congress ki sthapna 1885 me hui.
Bharat Chhodo Andolan (Quit India) 1942 me shuru hua.
Mahatma Gandhi ne 1930 me Dandi March (Namak Satyagrah) kiya.
Bharat 15 August 1947 ko swatantra hua.

quiz.question: Bharat Chhodo Andolan (Quit India Movement) kis varsh shuru hua?
quiz.explanation: Bharat Chhodo Andolan 1942 me Mahatma Gandhi ke netritva me shuru hua.

title: 🏦 RBI aur Mudra (Currency)
facts: Reserve Bank of India (RBI) ki sthapna 1 April 1935 ko hui.
RBI ka mukhyalay (headquarters) Mumbai me hai.
Bharat ki mudra 'Rupee' hai; iska symbol ₹ 2010 me aaya.
RBI note chhapne ka kaam karta hai, par 1 rupaye ka note Finance Ministry jaari karta hai.
RBI ko 'Banker's Bank' bhi kehte hain.

quiz.question: RBI (Reserve Bank of India) ka mukhyalay kahan hai?
quiz.explanation: RBI ka mukhyalay Mumbai me hai.

title: 🏏 Khel-Kud (Sports)
facts: Cricket ka pehla World Cup 1975 me hua tha.
Bharat ne Cricket World Cup 1983 (Kapil Dev) aur 2011 (M.S. Dhoni) me jeeta.
Hockey me Bharat ne Olympics me sabse zyada gold jeete hain.
Chess ke pehle Bharatiya Grandmaster Vishwanathan Anand the.
Major Dhyan Chand 'Hockey ke Jaadugar' kehlate hain; unka janmdin (29 Aug) National Sports Day hai.

quiz.question: Bharat ne pehli baar Cricket World Cup kab jeeta?
quiz.explanation: Bharat ne 1983 me Kapil Dev ki kaptani me pehla World Cup jeeta.

title: 🌊 Vishwa Bhugol (World Geography)
facts: Prashant Mahasagar (Pacific Ocean) duniya ka sabse bada mahasagar hai.
Sahara duniya ka sabse bada garam registan (hot desert) hai.
Nile aam taur par duniya ki sabse lambi nadi maani jaati hai.
Asia duniya ka sabse bada mahadweep (continent) hai.
Russia kshetrafal (area) me duniya ka sabse bada desh hai.

quiz.question: Duniya ka sabse bada mahasagar kaun sa hai?
quiz.explanation: Prashant Mahasagar (Pacific) duniya ka sabse bada mahasagar hai.

title: 🧪 Vigyan Basics (Science)
facts: Paani ka rasayanik sutra H2O hai.
Oxygen (O2) saans lene ke liye zaroori hai.
Common salt (namak) ka sutra NaCl hai.
Pedh-paudhe photosynthesis se CO2 lekar O2 chhodte hain.
Manushya ke khoon ka rang laal Haemoglobin (iron) ki wajah se hota hai.

quiz.question: Paani (water) ka rasayanik sutra kya hai?
quiz.explanation: Paani ka sutra H2O hai (2 hydrogen + 1 oxygen).

title: 🗺️ Bharat ke Rajya (Indian States)
facts: Kshetrafal (area) me sabse bada rajya: Rajasthan.
Aabaadi (population) me sabse bada rajya: Uttar Pradesh.
Kshetrafal me sabse chhota rajya: Goa.
Bharat me kul 28 rajya aur 8 kendra-shasit pradesh (UTs) hain.
Sabse zyada rajyon ki seema chhune wala rajya: Uttar Pradesh.

quiz.question: Kshetrafal (area) ki drishti se Bharat ka sabse bada rajya kaun sa hai?
quiz.explanation: Rajasthan kshetrafal me Bharat ka sabse bada rajya hai.

title: 🏅 Samman aur Puraskar (Awards)
facts: Bharat Ratna desh ka sabse bada nagrik (civilian) samman hai.
Padma awards: Padma Vibhushan > Padma Bhushan > Padma Shri.
Param Vir Chakra sabse bada veerta (military, wartime) puraskar hai.
Dadasaheb Phalke Award cinema ka sabse bada samman hai.
Khel ka sabse bada samman: Major Dhyan Chand Khel Ratna.

quiz.question: Bharat ka sabse bada nagrik (civilian) samman kaun sa hai?
quiz.explanation: Bharat Ratna desh ka sarvochch nagrik samman hai.

title: 💻 Computer Basics
facts: CPU ko computer ka 'dimaag' (brain) kehte hain.
RAM ek temporary (volatile) memory hai — bijli jaate hi data mit jata hai.
WWW (World Wide Web) ke aviष्kारak Tim Berners-Lee hain.
1 Byte = 8 Bits; 1 KB = 1024 Bytes.
Computer me sab kuch binary (0 aur 1) me hota hai.

quiz.question: Computer ka 'dimaag' (brain) kise kehte hain?
quiz.explanation: CPU (Central Processing Unit) ko computer ka dimaag kehte hain.
